text.title: Build-in-Public Content Engine Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Build-in-Public Content Engine.

example.scenario: Solo founder ships a CLI tool; weekly inputs → build-log + learning + number → atomized into 3 X posts; monthly review shows +120 followers + 30 list signups; engine retained.
example.trace: preconditions=true → procedure applied → artefact emitted → validate-script passes
